data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 1,500 USDT with a 3.24% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 08, 2025, 16:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 1,500 USDT and is now trading at 1,497.709961 USDT, with a narrowed 3.24% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Withdrawals Surge Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: According to Odaily, Intotheblock reported on the X platform that there was an unexpected surge in Bitcoin withdrawals from exchanges yesterday as market panic spread. This resulted in a net outflow exceeding $220 million, suggesting that investors might still be accumulating more Bitcoin at lower prices.

data.title: Ethereum Falls Below $1500 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum's price has recently dropped below $1500, currently trading at $1497.53 per coin. This marks a daily decrease of 2.22%.

data.title: IntoTheBlock: Yesterday, CEX Bitcoin net outflow exceeded US$220 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Intotheblock posted on the X platform that yesterday, as market panic spread, the number of bitcoins withdrawn from trading platforms unexpectedly surged, resulting in a net outflow of more than $220 million, which may indicate that investors are still taking advantage of lower prices to accumulate more bitcoins.

data.title: GMGN Lianchuang: The platform encountered intermittent traffic attacks that affected the user experience. We plan to stop whitelisting some crawler IPs in the future
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN co-founder Haze posted on X platform, "The platform has been under intermittent traffic attacks recently, with the goal of shutting down our website. But we have always withstood it. We have not issued a notice every time. 
At about 8 o'clock this evening, a large amount of traffic poured in instantly, causing the website to pop up a human-machine verification window. The website did not crash, but it affected the user experience. GMGN also opened a crawler IP whitelist for many community users (some users who can do data analysis, small products, and small businesses by themselves). It was basically opened with 0 conditions, and even if there was a condition, we basically did not review it. So there are still many community users' crawlers on our website. In the future, we plan to deal with traffic attack incidents and ensure user experience. We plan to strengthen traffic countermeasures. We also plan to start stopping some crawler IP whitelists."

data.title: Brazil's Central Bank to Announce Virtual Asset Regulations Soon
data.description: According to Foresight News, Brazilian central bank officials have indicated that regulations concerning virtual assets are expected to be released shortly. This development highlights the country's ongoing efforts to establish a regulatory framework for digital currencies and related technologies.

data.title: Justin Sun: TRON and Huobi HTX will always adhere to industry construction and provide a safe haven for the volatile crypto market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, global advisor of Huobi HTX, and core supporter of HTX DAO, appeared at the "TRON x HTX DAO 2025 Hong Kong Night". At the event, Sun Yuchen elaborated on his commitment to the development of TRON and Huobi HTX around the three keywords of "inheritance, perseverance, and construction". He said that in the current complex and changing geopolitical and financial environment, regardless of whether the market rises or falls, TRON and Huobi HTX will always stick to and continue to build, provide a safe haven for the volatile crypto market, and lead the blockchain to a brighter future.
In addition, based on his personal experience and his thoughts after appearing on the cover of Forbes, Sun Yuchen shared his views on the industry, emphasizing that practitioners should maintain an attitude of "fear, awe, and respect". He introduced that since entering the crypto market in 2012, he has always been walking on thin ice, and he feels a great responsibility in the face of every industry security incident. In the future, great efforts will still be needed to maintain awe and respect for the industry in order to win acceptance and recognition from the mainstream world.
He added that for 13 years, including TRON and Huobi HTX, he and his team have always kept these three attitudes in mind and worked tirelessly to prove the positive significance of cryptocurrency to the world, which not only inspired countless innovations, but also drove countless builders to create a future that is far more advanced than traditional finance.
Finally, Justin Sun pointed out that as the industry scale may expand to 20 trillion or even 200 trillion US dollars, its core task is to "calculate the accounts well and ensure security" to ensure the safety of user assets and clear accounts.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 78,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.26% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 08, 2025, 16:23 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 78,000 USDT and is now trading at 77,894.007813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.26% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Ark Invest Sells Bitcoin ETF Shares Worth $12.4 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ark Invest disclosed that it sold 159,496 shares of the ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (ARKB) from its ARKW fund on April 7. The transaction is valued at approximately $12.4 million.

data.title: Brazilian Central Bank Official: Central Bank Regulation on Virtual Assets is Expected to Be Introduced Soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that officials from the Brazilian Central Bank said that central bank regulation on virtual assets is expected to be introduced soon. (Jinshi)
